Jersey Girl (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,266,129Details
International Box Office $11,800,000
Worldwide Box Office $37,066,129
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,319,171 (32.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.04 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:68.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,520 opening theaters/1,821 max. theaters, 4.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $48,660,695

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 26th, 2004 (Wide) by Miramax
International Releases: August 12th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: April 5th, 2011 by Echo Bridge Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for language and sexual content including frank dialogue
Running Time: 102 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Gratuitous Cameos, Intertitle, Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Depression, Dysfunctional Family, Non-Chronological, Public Relations, Troubled Pregnancy or Miscarriage, Widow/Widower, Workaholic, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Advertising and Marketing, Music Industry
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: View Askew
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
